items.title: Apple plans to change its Hide My Email privacy feature that could make it less effective
items.content: In the coming weeks, Apple will move anonymously generated emails addresses to a different domain.

items.title: TechCrunch Mobility: SpaceX rockets past Tesla
items.content: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.

items.title: Hey, Siri, here’s what I actually want from AI
items.content: I'm desperate for a personal AI assistant, but do I really want to become the kind of person who can't function without the friendly robot voice in my phone?

items.title: WWDC 2026: Everything announced on Siri AI, iOS 27, Apple Intelligence, and more
items.content: Apple primarily made the case for an improved experience with its long-standing Siri assistant, which like most other announcements had a hefty helping of AI.

items.title: Microsoft taps Alt Carbon in sign of India’s growing role in carbon removal
items.content: Alt Carbon said the agreement followed more than a year of scientific review and due diligence, with Microsoft requiring additional verification and data-sharing measures.

items.title: Microsoft’s open source tools were hacked to steal passwords of AI developers
items.content: Microsoft shut down dozens of GitHub code repositories for Azure and AI coding tools after a reported hack.

items.title: Is this the dawn of the Tokenpocalypse?
items.content: We're likely to see more price increases as the big AI companies plan to go public.

items.title: Reid Hoffman is leaving Microsoft’s board to go ‘founder mode’ with  startup Manas
items.content: After a very profitable decade on Microsoft's board, Reid Hoffman is stepping down to focus on his AI drug discovery startup Manus.

items.title: Elon Musk’s Next Move May Be a Mega-Merger of SpaceX and Tesla
items.content: Some shareholders might object, but there is little they could do, legal experts say.

items.title: How to read the Fed’s projections like a pro.
Political Spotlight Shines on Warsh for His First Fed Meeting as Chairman
items.content: The new Fed chairman is bound to face the unyielding attention of the president that nominated him.

items.title: Who is Kevin Warsh, the Fed’s new chairman?
items.content: Mr. Warsh will make his public debut as the Federal Reserve’s chairman on Wednesday.
